3272030.name: Unleaving Soundtrack
3272030.description: The music of Unleaving is a mesmerizing blend of atmospheric soundscapes and emotional resonance, composed by the acclaimed Alicia Enstrom. The 28-minute Unleaving Soundtrack features Enstrom's signature blend of ethereal strings and haunting melodies, perfectly complementing the game's introspective narrative and surreal world. Her music evokes a sense of mystery and melancholy, immersing players in the experience while enhancing the emotional depth of Unleaving's story.
